solution:
```
class Solution:
    def divisorGame(self, n: int) -> bool:
        return n % 2 == 0
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The key insight is that Alice wins if and only if n is even. This is because Alice can always make a move when n is even, and Bob will eventually lose.
